_data_entry_rules.purpose: Copy this object into data/supervisors.json under the supervisors array after verification.
required_verification: Official university profile or faculty directory page for name, title, school, department, email, and homepage.
Official department or programme page for doctoral supervision status and doctoral programme eligibility.
Publication databases or official CV/profile for publication counts and SSCI/CSSCI counts.
Official university or education discipline source for university tier and education discipline ranking level.
do_not_publish_if: The only source is memory, social media, AI-generated text, or an unverified third-party page.
The email, homepage, publications, or research interests cannot be traced to a source URL.
The doctoral supervision status is inferred without evidence.

university_tier: Hong Kong | Mainland China | Global | Unknown
